HGSS.400.0000:
Well, hello!\f
It’s said that past this hole used to be
a huge tower reaching far into the sky.\f
They say that it was a rather strange
tower with half of it embedded\r
in the cliff.\f
It was not just a tall tower reaching
up to the sky, but also reaching deep\r
down underground!\f
It is rumored that it even reached the
bottom of the ocean!\f
In short, the ruins used to connect
the sky, the land, and the\r
sea to each other...\f
Most of the tower is now crumbled,
and the only things that remain are\r
the entrance and its interior, where\r
you’ll see strange patterns.
HGSS.400.0001:
I think this building may have been
built to enshrine Pokémon with\r
a strong connection to the sea,\r
the land, and the sky.
HGSS.400.0002:
A masked guy who looks great in front
of a huge torrential waterfall...\r
That’s me, Crasher Wake!\f
Who dares to talk to me so freely?\f
Oh!
You are that mask-fanatic Trainer\r
I saw at the Celadon Dept. Store!\f
HGSS.400.0003:
Wake: I heard about the great
waterfall near Cianwood and decided\r
to come see it.\f
This waterfall is awesome!\f
No human or Pokémon can survive
without water, yet that same water\r
can sometimes cause great suffering.\f
HGSS.400.0004:
Wake: You must be a Trainer from this
region, right?\f
I hope you’ll become a Trainer
with the qualities of water--\r
strong, tough to beat, yet\r
refreshing.\f
Good luck, mask-fanatic [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.400.0005:
Chuck: Ooomph!
You came all this way just to see me?\f
Then you might as well take a
picture with me, too. Yes? [0200,0000]
HGSS.400.0006:
Chuck: Say cheese!
Don’t close your eyes!\f
HGSS.400.0007:
Chuck: Great picture!
This wil be a good memory for you, too!
HGSS.400.0008:
Chuck: No? You came all the way
just to say no?
HGSS.400.0009:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
